question: Which one of the following cases does not require UA registration?

options.text: A recreational player who uses a radio-controlled kite above 250 grams.
A 10-year-old son who intends to use his 300 gram UA as part of a school science project.
A recreational flyer using a UA with a total weight of 200 grams.
A business entity who intends to market and sell commercial UA, each weighing 500 grams.
